title: Senior Business Development Manager at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Salarpuria Sattva Global Group:
Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva Global Group!
